How We Work Together

Three ways to work
with Treetop.

Fixed scopes. Defined outcomes. Pricing you know before we start. No hourly billing, no scope creep.

Start Here
AI Audit
Starting at $1,500

A one-week deep dive into your business to find your highest-leverage AI opportunities.

  • ✓ Business process mapping
  • ✓ AI opportunity identification
  • ✓ Prioritized roadmap (quick wins first)
  • ✓ Tool and workflow recommendations
  • ✓ 60-min readout call + Q&A
Timeline: 1 week
Learn more →
Most Popular
Claude Implementation
Starting at $3,500

End-to-end Claude implementation — custom workflows built, tested, and handed off with your team trained on them.

  • ✓ Everything in the AI Audit
  • ✓ Custom Claude workflow builds
  • ✓ Prompt library + playbooks
  • ✓ Team training session
  • ✓ ROI measurement framework
  • ✓ 30-day post-launch check-in
Timeline: 3–4 weeks
Learn more →
Ongoing
Monthly Retainer
Starting at $1,200/mo

Keep your implementation current and expanding with new workflows, optimization, and priority support each month.

  • ✓ Monthly workflow additions
  • ✓ Prompt optimization + tuning
  • ✓ Async support (Slack / email)
  • ✓ Monthly strategy call
  • ✓ Priority response time
Timeline: Month-to-month
Learn more →
Where to Begin

Not sure where to start?

Most clients begin with the AI Audit. It maps your business, identifies the best opportunities, and gives you a clear roadmap — and the $1,500 fee is fully credited toward any Implementation engagement.

Start with the Audit → Book a discovery call
Get Started

Book a discovery call.

Tell us a bit about your business and what you're hoping to solve. We'll respond within one business day.

We'll be in touch within one business day.
